stemHtml: Except when a clearance is obtained from an ATC unit, what are the minimum meteorological conditions for VFR flights taking-off or landing at an aerodrome located within a control zone?

options.a: Ceiling 1500 ft and Ground Visibility 5 km.
options.b: Ceiling 1000 ft and Ground Visibility 10 km.
options.c: Ceiling 1500 ft and Ground Visibility 8 km.
options.d: Ceiling 1000 ft and Ground Visibility 1.5 km.
